diagrams.title: 2D Homogeneous Transformation Matrix Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the general 3×3 matrix structure with labeled sub-matrices for rotation/scaling, translation, and perspective
diagrams.purpose: Understanding matrix organization for all transformation types

diagrams.title: Rotation About Origin
diagrams.description: Geometric visualization of counterclockwise rotation showing how a point (x,y) moves to (x',y') on a circle of radius r
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how rotation transforms coordinates mathematically and geometrically

diagrams.title: Translation Transformation
diagrams.description: Shows a point moving from position (x,y) to (x+tx, y+ty) using the translation matrix
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how translation adds offset to coordinates via matrix multiplication

diagrams.title: Scaling About Origin
diagrams.description: Demonstrates uniform and non-uniform scaling of a rectangle
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how diagonal scaling factors stretch/shrink objects from origin

diagrams.title: Rotation About Arbitrary Point
diagrams.description: Three-step transformation sequence: translate to origin, rotate, translate back
elements: Step 1: T(-px,-py) moves pivot to origin
Step 3: T(px,py) returns pivot to original position
diagrams.purpose: Understanding composite transformations for rotation about any pivot point

diagrams.title: Homogeneous to Cartesian Conversion
diagrams.description: Shows the division by w process for converting homogeneous coordinates to Cartesian
elements: Special case: w=0 for points at infinity
diagrams.purpose: Understanding perspective division and handling of the w component

visuals.title: Transformation In Homogeneous Coordinates
visuals.description: Visual diagram for transformation in homogeneous coordinates
